import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut buf = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = false
    if i == n
      is_ws = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
          is_ws = true
        else
          buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if string.len(buf) > 0
        match string.parse_int(buf)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        buf = ""
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut done = false
  while not done
    mut found = false
    mut best = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < xs.len()
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        mut eligible = true
        if have_prev and v <= prev
          eligible = false
        end
        if eligible
          if not found or v < best
            best = v
            found = true
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not found
      done = true
    else
      sorted = list.push(sorted, best)
      prev = best
      have_prev = true
    end
  end
  sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_unique(inter)

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
